GDPR Compliance Checklist: Organizations processing personal data of EU residents must maintain a Record of Processing Activities (RoPA) documenting the legal basis for each processing activity. Data subject rights including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection must be honored within 30 calendar days of a valid request. A Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) is mandatory for high-risk processing activities such as large-scale profiling or systematic monitoring. Data breaches likely to affect individuals' rights and freedoms must be reported to the supervisory authority within 72 hours of discovery.
